results.title: Creatify: The AI Video Ad Maker
results.content:
Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.

Every media buyer knows the ritual: five dashboards, three hours of reports, still guessing what to do next. Creatify AI Media Buyer connects to your Meta, Google, AppLovin and TikTok ad accounts and does what a human buyer does audits campaigns, finds spend that's quietly bleeding, spots what's scaling, and acts on it. It generates new creatives from your actual winners and launches them, all through chat. And it remembers your account history, so its recommendations compound over time.

## AI Media Buyer By Creatify

Launching today

Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily. [...] Maker

Hey Product Hunt, I'm Yinan, founder of Creatify.

Quick backstory: we've spent 3 years building Creatify. Started with URL to video, then avatars, Ad Clone, and a full creative agent. 3M+ users have used the platform.

But one thing kept bothering me. Our users would make great ads, launch them, then go back to staring at dashboards for hours trying to figure out what was working. The creative side was solved. The media buying side was still manual, scattered, and slow.

So we built AI Media Buyer an agent that plugs into your ad accounts and actually does the work.

How it runs:

results.title: Introducing AI Media Buyer: AI That Runs Your Ads
results.content:
## FAQ

What is AI Media Buyer?

AI Media Buyer is Creatify's AI advertising agent. It connects to your ad accounts, audits your spend, builds campaigns and creative, launches them, and keeps optimizing, all from a chat interface. It's powered by Claude Opus 4.7.

What is media buying?

Media buying is the process of purchasing ad placements and managing the budget, targeting, and creative behind them to reach an audience efficiently. AI media buying uses an AI agent to handle the repetitive parts of that work, like analysis, campaign setup, and optimization, while a human sets the strategy.

Which platforms does AI Media Buyer connect to? [...] ## FAQ

What is AI Media Buyer?

AI Media Buyer is Creatify's AI advertising agent. It connects to your ad accounts, audits your spend, builds campaigns and creative, launches them, and keeps optimizing, all from a chat interface. It's powered by Claude Opus 4.7.

What is media buying?

Media buying is the process of purchasing ad placements and managing the budget, targeting, and creative behind them to reach an audience efficiently. AI media buying uses an AI agent to handle the repetitive parts of that work, like analysis, campaign setup, and optimization, while a human sets the strategy.

Which platforms does AI Media Buyer connect to? [...] Today we're launching AI Media Buyer, an AI advertising agent inside Creatify that connects to your ad accounts and runs them. It audits your spend, finds what's scaling and what's leaking, builds new campaigns and creative, and launches them. Most tools tell you what happened. AI Media Buyer does something about it.

It's powered by Claude Opus 4.8, one of Anthropic's most advanced reasoning models, and it can go from a brief to a live campaign in under 60 seconds.

results.title: Creatify AI vs TryCrush: The Best AI Ad Generator Revealed
results.content:
While Creatify AI offers quick URL-to-video tools for beginners, TryCrush provides a complete autonomous growth engine for media buyers. Discover the critical differences and learn which AI ad platform will truly scale your ad spend profitably.

The transition from traditional media buying to AI-assisted advertising is complete. The question is no longer whether you should use artificial intelligence to generate your ads, but rather which system will give you the most significant competitive advantage.

As businesses race to lower their Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) and scale their daily spend, the choice of software becomes the most critical decision a marketing team can make. [...] ### Stop Guessing. Start Crushing.

AI Ad Manager trained by world-class media buyers to generate your creatives and optimize your ads 24/7.

Learn more

Data visualization and analytics dashboard demonstrating modern AI media buying performance and automated ad scaling.

### What is Media Buying in 2026? The AI Revolution

The digital revolution changed advertising forever, but AI is completely rewriting the rules. results.title: Creatify Review: Best AI Tool for Ads & Marketing Content
results.content: of using Creatify. So Creatify really shines in several key areas. Number one is time savings. You can generate ready to run ads in literally minutes instead of hours, days, or even weeks. It's perfect for rapid campaign launches or lastminute promotions. Ease of use. The interface is super intuitive. You don't need video editing experience to produce professional looking ads. Versatility handles both images and videos across multiple formats and languages. Data driven. It has built-in optimization suggestions for improvements based on real performance metrics. Scalability. The batch creation means that agencies can produce large numbers of ads for different clients quickly. Cons and limitations. Now, no tool is perfect. So, here are some areas where Creatify might fall short. [...] really powerful. Step one, input your ad brief. Just start by providing Creatify with information about your product or service. Now, this can be a URL, a script, or bullet points outlining features, value propositions, and your target audience. The more details you provide, the better Creatify can tailor these ads. Step two, AI generates multiple variations. Once your brief is submitted, Creatifi's algorithms generate a range of videos and image ads. These include different layouts, color schemes, pacing, and messaging angles. You might see one video focusing on a product's benefits, and another emphasizing user testimonials or problem solving. Step three, review and edit. You're not locked in to the AI's suggestions. Creatify provides a video editor that lets you tweak text, swap [...] of ads at once. Creatifi's batch mode lets you generate multiple videos or images in one go. Provide different product links or scripts and the platform cranks out variations for each one simultaneously. AI powered personalization and optimization. Creatify doesn't just generate ads. It analyzes performance data to refine them. It tracks engagement metrics like click-through rates and view durations and then suggests tweaks. So over time, its AI learns which visuals and messaging resonate with your audience. Multiformat support. Creatify handles various aspect ratios and formats right out of the box. Whether you need 16 by9 for YouTube, one to one for Instagram or vertical 9 by6 for Tik Tok, you can generate each format with tailored designs. This saves time compared to manually adapting
